children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read and store raw input data into raw_data store
children.behavior: Parse input JSON, extract source, read data from source, store in raw_data, log ingestion
guarantees: raw_data is stored for further processing

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: store ingested raw data for downstream processing

outputs.name: ingestion_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records count

global_vars.description: store ingested raw data for downstream processing

data_operations.description: store ingested raw data for downstream processing

constraints.description: raw_data must be empty before write

acceptance_criteria.description: raw_data contains ingested records after execution

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw data and store in processed_data
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply transformations (e.g., cleaning, mapping), write to processed_data, log transformation

call_inputs.name: trigger
call_inputs.description: empty dict to signal parent orchestration

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: store transformed data for validation and export

outputs.name: transformation_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records transformed

global_vars.description: store transformed data for validation and export

data_operations.description: store transformed data for validation and export

constraints.description: raw_data must be populated before read
processed_data must be empty before write

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data contains transformed records after execution

children.name: ValidateQuality
children.purpose: Check processed data for quality and filter valid records
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply validation rules (e.g., schema, range), mark invalid records, log validation results
guarantees: invalid records are excluded from export

call_inputs.name: trigger
call_inputs.description: empty dict to signal parent orchestration

outputs.name: validation_result
outputs.description: JSON with valid records count and errors list

constraints.description: processed_data must be populated before read

acceptance_criteria.description: validation_result contains valid records count and errors list

children.name: ExportResults
children.purpose: Export only valid records to output
children.behavior: Read valid records from processed_data (based on validation), format output JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data, log export

call_inputs.name: validation_result
call_inputs.description: validation results including valid records info

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: read processed data to extract valid records based on validation

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: Final JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data

global_vars.description: read processed data to extract valid records based on validation

data_operations.description: read processed data to extract valid records based on validation

constraints.description: processed_data must be populated before read

acceptance_criteria.description: output contains only valid records from processed_data

governance_notes: All governance and resource fields derived from internal_leaf_accesses. global_vars and data_operations are synchronized for each child. No child has write operations on resources that are read-only in the system. IngestData writes to raw_data; TransformData reads raw_data and writes processed_data; ValidateQuality and ExportResults only read processed_data. No deliberate exceptions.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All signatures remain unchanged from Stage 2. No parameters added or removed.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: Each internal_leaf_access entry maps directly to a global_vars entry and a data_operations entry with matching resource name, operation type, and description.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For each child, the set of global_vars exactly matches the set of data_operations. No mismatches or omissions.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All resources (raw_data, processed_data) referenced in internal_leaf_accesses are covered in global_vars and data_operations. No resource is left unaccounted.
